payload.description: Launch B82 Southern Brooklyn Select Bus Service
Present final plan to community boards and elected officials, continue stakeholder outreach, begin fare machine construction at B82 SBS stops
Implement project street designs and install SBS stop amenities including fare machines, bus shelters, wayfinding totems with countdown clocks
MTA station reconstruction project at Canarsie-Rockaway Parkway station; B82 SBS will temporarily stop outside on Glenwood Rd

tool_args.label: B82 SBS Proposed Route Change via Glenwood Rd

payload.claim_text: Proposed re-route westbound via Glenwood Rd for more direct connection to L station. Westbound buses will be re-routed via Glenwood Rd bus lane for faster, more direct routing to Canarsie-Rockaway Pkwy station.

warnings: claim.route is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Route ids should link to route records when supported. Suggested relation: route has_claim claim when the route endpoint resolves exactly.

payload.claim_text: Westbound loop confusing and slow for bus customers. Can take up to 10 minutes to return to Flatlands Ave. Adds unnecessary traffic on local streets and at major intersections.

warnings: claim.route is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Route ids should link to route records when supported. Suggested relation: route has_claim claim when the route endpoint resolves exactly.

payload.claim_text: Bus lanes serve all buses, emergency vehicles, and right turns

Buses are delayed by traffic, double parking, difficulty pulling in and out of bus stops. Customers wait in long lines to pay on board the bus. Some bus stops lack amenities (seating, shelters, countdown clocks, etc.)

warnings: claim.route is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Route ids should link to route records when supported. Suggested relation: route has_claim claim when the route endpoint resolves exactly.

tool_args.label: Key Safety Issues Identified along B82 in CB5

payload.claim_text: Long pedestrian crossings along Pennsylvania Ave and Flatlands Ave, long gaps between places to safely cross the street, limited visibility at some intersections, difficult turns across traffic
